channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Atef Najib faces at least 10 charges in landmark Syria trial
item.description: Cousin of former President Bashar al-Assad faces charges that include murder, torture and responsibility for massacres.

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposal to end war via mediator Pakistan
item.description: According to the proposal, initial negotiations will focus on ending hostilities.

item.title: Can central banks curb inflation as energy costs rise?
item.description: Central banks hold rates steady as energy shock tests inflation fight.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire under strain as Gulf states report drone attacks
item.description: Drone hits cargo ship off Qatar’s coast, while Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates repel attacks.

item.title: Why is being a mother so expensive in the United States?
item.description: On Mother’s Day, Al Jazeera details the high cost of motherhood in the US compared with the rest of the world.

item.title: The genocide is still taking Gaza’s mothers
item.description: It now wants to take mine.

item.title: How did Gaza’s sea become a wall?
item.description: For 18 years, Israel has enforced a naval blockade around the Gaza Strip.

item.title: El Clasico: Kylian Mbappe not in Real Madrid squad to face Barcelona
item.description: French forward to miss the crucial fixture despite training with teammates on Friday following his recovery from injury.

item.title: Why is Iran taking time to respond to the US proposal to end the war?
item.description: Iran continues to review the proposal as Tehran's nuclear programme and Strait of Hormuz remain main sticking points.

item.title: Iran military warns of ‘surprising’ methods of warfare if attacked again
item.description: Iran’s army spokesman says if the ‘enemy’ were to attack again, they would face new methods of warfare.

item.title: Libya’s Zawiya refinery resumes full operations
item.description: Refinery closed for about two days after fighting near the facility 40km west of Tripoli.

item.title: AFC Asian Cup 2027: Japan to face defending champions Qatar in tough draw
item.description: Saudi Arabia will host the 2027 tournament from January 7 to February 5 and will face Palestine, Kuwait and Oman.

item.title: OKC Thunder bury LA Lakers to take 3-0 NBA Playoff series lead
item.description: Thunder use an explosive second half to beat LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers 131-108 as Ajay Mitchell scores 24.

item.title: Syria sees first government reshuffle since al-Assad’s ouster
item.description: The reshuffle by President Ahmed al-Sharaa comes amid protests over alleged poor governance.

item.title: Rebel fighters kill at least 69 people in northeastern DR Congo
item.description: Security officials say CODECO militia groups carried out the attack in Ituri province.

item.title: JNIM and Tuareg fighters join forces
item.description: AJ's Defence Editor breaks down the latest threat to Mali’s government and the rapid retreat of Russian forces there

item.title: Deadly car bomb attack hits checkpoint in northwest Pakistan
item.description: A suspected car bombing followed by a firefight at a police checkpoint has killed more than a dozen people in Bannu.

item.title: Iran war day 72: Tehran yet to reply to US plan; Israel bombs Lebanon
item.description: Israel kills at least 24 people in Lebanon in one day as Tehran's response to US proposal to end the war is awaited.

item.title: Flotilla activists arrive in Turkiye before setting sail to Gaza
item.description: Over 30 Global Sumud Flotilla vessels have reached Marmaris on Turkiye’s coast, preparing for their mission to Gaza.

item.title: Flotilla activist gives defiant message after Israel deports him to Greece
item.description: After a week in Israeli custody, flotilla activist Saif Abu Keshek has been deported to Greece.

item.title: Sabalenka out of Italian Open amid injury concerns for Roland Garros
item.description: ⁠Sorana Cirstea defeated world's top women's player 2-6, 6-3, 7-5 in the third round as she suffered pain in lower back.

item.title: Israel deports two abducted Gaza aid flotilla activists
item.description: The pair was seized by Israeli forces from the aid flotilla in late April and held in Israel.

item.title: Plane carrying Spanish passengers from hantavirus-hit ship departs for Madrid
item.description: Some passengers from the cruise ship disembarked in the Canary Islands before departing for Spain.

item.title: Strickland delivers first defeat to Chimaev on split decision at UFC 328
item.description: Sean Strickland won 48–47, 48–47 and 47–48 against Khamzat Chimaev in a fight that failed to live up to its hype.

item.title: Dubois stops Wardley in 11th round to take WBO heavyweight boxing title
item.description: Daniel Dubois recovered from two knockdowns to win a second World Heavyweight title with a stoppage of Fabio Wardley.
